name: the default PR sources catalog is valid YAML that parses without error and contains a sources array
command: node -e "const yaml=require('js-yaml'),fs=require('fs');const d=yaml.load(fs.readFileSync(process.env.CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT+'/pr-corpus/sources/PR-SOURCES.defaults.yaml','utf8'));if(!Array.isArray(d.sources))throw new Error('sources not array');if(d.sources.length!==10)throw new Error('expected 10');console.error('ok');" 2>err.txt && grep -q ok err.txt && echo ok 1>&2
